channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-25470 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress ACPT (Pro) - Custom Post Types plugin for WordPress plugin <= 2.0.47 - Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in ACPT ACPT (Pro) - Custom Post Types Plugin for WordPress allows Remote Code Inclusion. This issue affects ACPT (Pro) - Custom Post Types Plugin for WordPress: from n/a through…

item.title: CVE-2026-39598 · 8 HIGH — WordPress Academy LMS Pro plugin < 3.5.2 - Arbitrary File Upload vulnerability
item.description: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in Kodezen LLC Academy LMS Pro allows Upload a Web Shell to a Web Server. This issue affects Academy LMS Pro: from n/a before 3.5.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-49073 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Directorist Booking plugin <= 3.0.3 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in wpWax Directorist Booking allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Directorist Booking: from n/a through 3.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-49113 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Cornerstone plugin < 7.8.8 - Arbitrary Code Execution vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber Arbitrary Code Execution in Cornerstone < 7.8.8 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49080 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress wpDataTables plugin <= 7.3.6 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in wpDataTables <= 7.3.6 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49057 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress JobSearch plugin <= 3.2.7 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in JobSearch <= 3.2.7 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-48869 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Enfold theme <= 7.1.4 - Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Enfold <= 7.1.4 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-40761 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Valeska theme <= 1.2.2 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Valeska <= 1.2.2 versions.
